文笔也是十分不错，这部小说给我的惊喜很大，希望作者能够继续加油，写出一本规则怪谈神作！","text_exts":[{"e":98,"s":94,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774178200F9257215%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227258978872832574249%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227209898721511738406%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690112786,"group_id":"7209898721511738406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"啊~好饿(哭唧唧)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+4FfGfSdlN4Q4vQiaMHnr30U7iAssdwwGNit1egXRw8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c9741358376d45f3be8947b759aabee1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706629&x-signature=4tmp%2FdF%2FNAPsczl4iYGrHt8Yf88%3D","user_id":"3742376699366926","user_name":"冬天幻灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3742376699366926","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7209898721511738406","book_info":{"abstract":"【惊悚游戏+恐怖复苏+爽文】
惊悚游戏降临世界，陈寻意外被选中成为游戏玩家，触碰游戏规则就会死。
也就是在这个时候，陈寻成功开启系统，继承了祖宗的九万亿冥币。
404血色列车副本，陈寻成为了最尊贵的铂金会员。
血腥幼儿园副本，陈寻直接将整个幼儿园买了下来。
副本里，他的规则就是规则。
之后他不断在惊悚世界当中购买资产，手里的冥币是越用越多。
最后厉鬼倒贴，女鬼做秘书，鬼王当小弟。
数年之后，陈寻站在惊悚世界最高的惊悚大厦之上，看着下方繁华的惊悚世界，心中不断感叹：
“刚开始的时候，我只是想在惊悚世界当中活下来。”
“可现在整个惊悚世界，都是我家的了。”
【开篇会有一段主角刚进入游戏，为了升级花了一点钱救了其他玩家的剧情，不喜欢的，觉得毒的可以直接划走。PS：第一个剧情的那个女生，后面不会再出现了。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4bf1e65350f1721956ce03c79f78ee4c","author":"桃花夜夜开","author_id":"","book_id":"7209898721511738406","book_name":"你惹他干嘛？惊悚世界都是他家的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#481020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7209958718367236611","read_count":"30360","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1053255"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"485","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,灵异,开局,惊悚游戏,副本,悬疑,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d552033b4b4052b9318fa014093ee495~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362200&x-signature=xR
